summary: Iteration 34 (Session 7): Backend-only test pass for the external Lovable 'Luna Hub' admin portal. Covered public /api/config/public, admin /api/admin/config CRUD + auth (hub-key and JWT), milestones CRUD with default→custom fallback and user-facing surfacing, bottle image overrides merged into /api/bookings/bottle-menu/{venue_id}, venue overrides (tagline/status/is_hidden) merged into GET /api/venues + /api/venues/{id}, plus regression for existing admin endpoints (missions/rewards/boosts/auctions) and public endpoints. 31/31 tests passed. Cleanup ran successfully — app_config reset to defaults, bottle_overrides cleared, venue_overrides cleared, milestones_custom empty (source='default', total=6).

minor.issue: On first write the endpoint auto-seeds db.milestones_custom with the 6 hardcoded defaults, then applies the caller's upsert. This means any subsequent DELETE only removes the custom id — the 6 seeded defaults remain as DB rows. Functionally equivalent (list returns the same 6 defaults, just now sourced from DB), but noteworthy: once any admin edit happens, the collection is never empty again and the 'source' flag flips to 'custom' permanently. Cleaning up requires deleting every default id explicitly.

Total returned is 28 (not 48 as the spec text claims). Eclipse alone has 20 bottles; other 8 venues share the remaining 8. If the spec of 48 is correct, BOTTLE_MENUS is under-populated for non-Eclipse venues. Not a regression — test asserted >=10 and passed — but flag for product review.

action_items: (optional) Verify with product whether GET /api/admin/bottles is expected to return 48 bottles across all 9 venues — current total is 28.

(optional) Consider not auto-seeding defaults into db.milestones_custom on first write — instead layer overrides on top of defaults so the admin can cleanly reset to 'pure default' without deleting every row.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/admin.py is now 1122 lines and covers ~10 distinct domains (missions/rewards/boosts/auctions/config/milestones/bottles/venues/campaigns/seed). Recommend splitting into per-domain modules (admin/config.py, admin/milestones.py, etc.) — exceeds the 700-line file-size guideline.
require_admin() re-imports `os` inside every call. Minor perf nit — move to module-level import.

PUT /api/admin/config uses body.model_dump(exclude_unset=True) to support null-clearing, but nested StatusPillUpdate is dumped with its own defaults (not exclude_unset) inside the outer dump. Test proved it works for the explicit-null-clear case because the caller re-sends {custom_message: null}; however sending {status_pill: {closed_text: 'x'}} will also include ALL other status_pill keys as null in the dump unless Pydantic v2 recursively honours exclude_unset. Verified empirically it does (open_text stays 'LIVE NOW'), but worth adding a unit test if Pydantic is ever upgraded.
/api/admin/bottles merges overrides into BOTTLE_MENUS at runtime — no pagination or streaming. Fine for 28–48 items today, but any future catalog growth should paginate.

/api/admin/venues/{id} with is_hidden=true silently removes venue from public GET /api/venues list but still returns it on GET /api/venues/{id}. Intentional (admin deep-link / portal preview) and matches review spec, but worth documenting.
test_credentials: Hub key header X-Luna-Hub-Key=luna_hub_live_682fbaaa19a6a4594f58618b803531ee6fad8016. User JWT via POST /api/auth/login {email: luna@test.com, password: test123}.
seed_data_creation: Test run created and then deleted: 1 test milestone (test_milestone), 1 bottle override (ecl_belvedere_700), 1 venue override (eclipse), 1 app_config doc. Session-scoped teardown fixture clears all. Verified post-run: /api/config/public is at defaults, /api/admin/milestones source=default total=6, no bottle or venue overrides remaining.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 31 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_luna_hub_admin_crud.py pass. The file is idempotent — session fixture cleans up. If a future session leaves milestones_custom populated, run: for mid in vip_status luna_elite supernova newbie rising_star legend; do curl -X DELETE -H 'X-Luna-Hub-Key: luna_hub_live_...' $BASE/api/admin/milestones/$mid; done. Eclipse is the only venue with a full bottle catalog (20 items). Public endpoints /api/missions and /api/rewards return 200 (not auth-protected).
rca of the issue: No bugs found — all 31 acceptance checks (6 public-config + auth, 2 app-config PUT, 6 milestones CRUD, 5 bottle overrides, 6 venue overrides, 4 admin regression, 4 public regression) passed on first run against the live preview URL https://luna-mobile-stage.preview.emergentagent.com.
